## Color Palette

```
--bg:       #0A0A0F
--surface:  #13131A
--text:     #F8F8F7
--violet:   #7C6FCD
--teal:     #4FAFA8
--error:    #e06c75
```

## Typography

Font: system-ui
Weights: 400 (body), 500 (label), 600 (heading)
Scale: text-xs / text-sm / text-base / text-lg / text-xl / text-2xl

## Animation

glow-duration: 4s
glow-blur: 80px
glow-opacity-min: 0.55
glow-opacity-max: 1.00
glow-delay: -1.8s
